items.title: Real-time recommendation ranking
items.description: Models train offline on labeled click logs; inference scores candidate items per user request in milliseconds — training is periodic, inference is continuous.

items.title: Medical triage scoring
items.description: Classifiers train on labeled historical cases; hospitals run inference on new patient features at intake without waiting for confirmed diagnoses.

items.title: Speech-to-text deployment
items.description: Acoustic models train on transcribed audio; mobile keyboards run inference on live microphone frames with frozen weights.

items.title: Credit risk batch scoring
items.description: Lenders fit models on labeled default histories, then nightly batch inference scores millions of loan applications without retraining each row.

items.title: Edge device vision
items.description: Models train in the cloud on labeled datasets, export to ONNX/TFLite, and run inference on-device where labels are unavailable and updates are infrequent.

items.title: A/B-tested model serving
items.description: Multiple trained checkpoints serve inference behind feature flags; traffic splits measure live performance while training pipelines produce new candidates offline.
